notes: New: Private Tab landing page (Externo Private) with search bar and privacy info. New: Bookmark folders — organize bookmarks into folders in the bar and panel. Fix: Ad Blocker now actively skips YouTube ads and hides banner ads. Fix: Reader Mode now applies correctly on page load. Fix: Typing Sounds now work on all pages (AudioContext resume fix). Fix: Homepage setting now saves as you type and opens correctly. Fix: Auto-updater now restarts silently (no CMD window) and relaunches the browser after updating.
